full_function:
def cmd_list_all_python_files_in_the_current_sc(session_id: str):
    """
    list all Python files in the current scope

    LLM-implemented via qwen3:8b by forge-command-implement
    """
    from agents.forge.memory import write_audit_entry
    scope = Path(get_session_paths()[0])
    results = [p.relative_to(scope) for p in scope.rglob('*.py') if not p.name.startswith('.')]
    print()
    print('── list all Python files in the curren ──')
    for item in results:
        print(f'  {item}')  
    print()
    write_audit_entry(session_id, 'CMD_LIST_ALL_PYTHON_FILES_IN_THE_CURRENT_SC_EXECUTED', str(scope), str(len(results)), 'done')
